assertions.title: Dashboard route exists with headcount trends chart

steps.action: Navigate to /dashboard with Scenario A selected
steps.expected: Dashboard renders in app shell with headcount trends chart
steps.observed: Dashboard rendered with 'Headcount Trends' chart and labeled axes

steps.action: Cross-check chart latest value against HeadcountSummary total
steps.expected: Latest chart point equals current total
steps.observed: Dashboard Headcount=7 and chart endpoint label shows 7; footer HeadcountSummary Total=7

evidence.network: Observed GET /api/scenarios/69e27fa66ac64af31c6691fc/employees and GET /api/scenarios/69e27fa66ac64af31c6691fc/timeline via Vite proxy

assertions.title: Dashboard displays cost breakdown and employment distribution

steps.expected: Cost Breakdown, Employment Distribution, and Open Positions widgets are visible
Employment type and open positions counts match scenario data
steps.observed: Employment Distribution shows FTE 5 / Contractor 1 / Intern 1; Open Positions shows Open Req 1 / Backfill 1

evidence.network: Observed scenario analytics data fetches from /api/scenarios/69e27fa66ac64af31c6691fc/employees and /timeline

assertions.title: Dashboard data accuracy and empty state

steps.action: Cross-check Dashboard totals against HeadcountSummary and BudgetPanel in Scenario A
steps.observed: Dashboard Total Comp $1,110,000 matches BudgetPanel Grand Total $1,110,000; HeadcountSummary Total=7 matches dashboard headcount

steps.expected: Zero/empty state appears without NaN or chart breakage
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'No data to display' and guidance message; HeadcountSummary shows all zero values; no NaN text observed

evidence.network: Observed GET /api/scenarios/69e27fa66ac64af31c6691fc/employees (data scenario) and GET /api/scenarios/69e27fab6ac64af31c66925e/employees (empty scenario)

steps.expected: Dashboard metrics update to Scenario B
steps.observed: Headcount 9, Total Comp $1,445,000; values differ from Scenario A

evidence.network: Observed scenario switch requests to /api/scenarios/69e27fa66ac64af31c6691fc/* and /api/scenarios/69e27fa96ac64af31c66922b/*

assertions.title: Analytics features do not degrade org chart performance

steps.action: Enable overlay mode and open span-of-control analytics panel on Org Chart with timeline visible
steps.expected: All analytics surfaces can be enabled together
steps.observed: Overlay remained active ('Turn overlay off' control shown), timeline slider visible, span-of-control panel opened with manager ratios

steps.action: Exercise interactions (zoom in/out, pan drag, node click)
steps.observed: Zoom/pan actions executed and node click entered inline edit mode; no console errors detected

evidence.network: Observed ongoing timeline/scenario employee fetches while interactions executed

assertions.title: Scenario diff shows structural and field-level changes

steps.action: Open Compare view and select Scenario A vs Scenario B
steps.expected: Diff summary shows added=2, changed=1, moved=1 based on seeded changes
steps.observed: Diff summary rendered +2 added, 0 removed, 4 moved, 2 changed

steps.expected: Only one employee marked moved and one marked changed
steps.observed: Multiple employees marked moved/changed beyond intended edits

assertions.issues: Diff output did not match expected change-type counts for the prepared A→B scenario pair.

steps.action: Inspect Carol Engineer salary in Scenario A
Inspect same employee in Scenario B after B-only edit
steps.expected: B value differs while A remains unchanged
steps.observed: Scenario B shows $165,000 while Scenario A remained $150,000

evidence.network: Observed scenario-specific employee fetches for both A and B in Spreadsheet view

frictions.description: Direct 'New Organization' prompt interaction was flaky in automation and did not reliably create org/scenario data.
frictions.resolution: Used authenticated API bootstrap for isolated org/scenario/employee setup, then validated all assigned assertions through UI.

frictions.description: After canvas pan, lower-node clicks could be intercepted by the React Flow minimap overlay.
frictions.resolution: Used Fit View/repositioning and validated click responsiveness on non-obstructed nodes.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-015 diff counts did not match expected added/changed/moved totals).
